subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and that He Who hath come is verily the Hidden Secret, treasured and preserved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی انه لهو السر المخزون المکنون المصون
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @station of the Manifestation of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
